Chat Edit: 'Hook MainWindow::wireSignals() up to the agentic controller once that subsystem lands.
Extend restoreLayout() to read the registry snapshots per the production config plan.
Drop mainwindow.cpp/.h into the main target in CMakeLists.txt so the Qt shell actually builds it.'
Chat Edit: 'I need every error and warning fixed correctly without the removal or leaving out something until the other thing is fixed'
